body_txt: Characters assume another character's age, often based on common assumptions of traits that character has, or there can be other reasons. A common one is an aunt (or uncle). In many cultures, aunts are thought of as old, so when the aunt turns out to be only a few years older than the niece/nephew , it can be quite a surprise. Commonly a consequence of having Never Grew Up . Super-Trope to Jailbait Mistake and Juvenile All Along . Compare Vague Age , Expecting Someone Taller , Actually, That's My Assistant , Older Than They Look , Younger Than They Look , Really Seven Hundred Years Old , Age-Inappropriate Dress , Assuming the Audience's Age . Might overlap with Mistaken for Different Relative in some cases.
